campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they heard council reports and a public hearing under government code section 3502. Key discussion items included staffing vacancies and the city's recruitment and retention efforts, as well as upcoming events like the Boogie Festival happening that weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Public hearing under government code section 3502
Boogie Festival this weekend
Property security and home protection measures

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — June 3, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council met to decide which service level option to use for sheriff services in the coming fiscal year. Once Council picks their preferred approach, staff will provide additional direction on next steps.
keyTopics: Choosing among multiple sheriff service level options for FY 2026
Setting the city's near-term sheriff services strategy
Next steps contingent on Council's service level decision

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 16, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on June 16, 2026, to approve meeting minutes from recent sessions and authorize the Town Manager to sign several agreements. The council approved contract extensions and amendments related to software services, legal representation, and litigation support.
keyTopics: Approved previous meeting minutes from June 2 and June 8
Extended software services agreement for five years
Updated legal services contract with fourth amendment
Authorized new litigation legal services agreement
Adopted a resolution

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 17, 2026
san-jose.summary: San José City Council held a brief procedural meeting on June 17, 2026, to organize upcoming council business. The council reviewed and finalized the agenda for their June 23 meeting and approved funding to support the city's participation in the Rose, White & Blue Parade and Festival.
keyTopics: Finalized June 23, 2026 council agenda with any necessary time assignments
Approved city spending and donations for Rose, White & Blue Parade and Festival participation
Reviewed public records from June 4-11, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 23, 2026
mountain-view.summary: Mountain View City Council met to handle several administrative matters, including private legal discussions about two pending lawsuits, budget approvals for the coming fiscal year, and updates to water management plans. The council also recognized local organizations and honored City Attorney Jennifer Logue's appointment to the judiciary.
keyTopics: Two pending lawsuits requiring legal counsel discussion
Fiscal Year 2026-27 budget and spending limits
Water management and drought contingency planning updates
Capital improvement projects including public safety building and golf course parking lot repairs
Salt pond restoration project moving forward

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 23, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special closed-session meeting on June 23, 2026, followed by a regular council meeting at 7 P.M. The specific details of what was discussed in the closed session were not made public, as these sessions are held privately.
keyTopics: Closed session meeting held before regular council session
Regular council meeting convened at 7 P.M.

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how parks and recreational facilities are currently zoned and designated in Cupertino, and to make sure the city's rules match California state laws that protect these spaces. The meeting also included a public comment period where residents could address the Council about topics not on the agenda.
keyTopics: Review of current zoning for parks and recreational facilities
Zoning corrections to align with state law protections
Designations for parkland sites across Cupertino
Public comment period on non-agenda items (30 minutes)

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 30, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a hybrid meeting on June 30, 2026, allowing residents to participate both in person and remotely via Zoom. The city is accepting written public comments from residents before the meeting through their online system.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format available via Zoom and phone for remote participation
Public comment submission process through eComment system on City Council Agenda page
In-person attendance option continues at City Council meetings

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — June 16, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve the city's 2026-2027 budget and spending plan for federal community development funds, reviewed a new real estate development project with a site permit and map, and discussed a new crime prevention program focused on storefronts. The council also handled routine housekeeping items like approving meeting minutes and setting the schedule for upcoming sessions.
keyTopics: 2026-2027 Annual Action Plan and Community Development Block Grant approval
Site development permit and vesting tentative map for a new project
Storefront Crime Prevention Program proposal
City Council calendar and meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — June 23, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to vote on turning part of the Measure E development site into public parkland and reviewed plans to expand the driving range at Baylands Golf Links. The council also received updates from various city departments and council liaisons.
keyTopics: New parkland dedication at Measure E site
Baylands Golf Links driving range expansion feasibility
Department and liaison updates
